headline: Autodesk Earnings Beat Highlights Agentic AI Shift And Valuation Gap
summary: Autodesk (NasdaqGS:ADSK) reported quarterly results that exceeded revenue and billings expectations. The CEO outlined plans to build agentic AI products using specialized data and new platform capabilities. The company highlighted AI as a core focus for its future product roadmap and customer offerings. Autodesk enters this AI pivot with a mixed recent share performance, with the stock at $229.84 and returns showing a 7.1% decline over the past week and 6.5% decline over the past month...
